examples: As comets go, it is a whopper.
Knightley's next role was pretty small, but the movie was an absolute whopper.
This whopper may well grow more than 1.8m tall and has white flowers like huge bells.
This year is shaping up to be a whopper when it comes to video game lawsuits.
This whopper is what the altruist code does to the intellects of those who internalize it.
